text: my cat knocked my coffee off the table and then stared at me like i deserved it
vet charged me $400 to tell me my dog is just dramatic
the fish tank is the only peaceful thing in this house and even the snail is fighting
hamster escaped again. found him in the sock drawer living his best life
i secretly watch birds from my window and idk how to tell my friends
named my cat sir fluffington and now i have to say that at the vet out loud
walking the dog in rain is just paying for the privilege of being wet and cold
my partner asked me to choose between them and the cat. i miss my partner sometimes
dog park drama today. someone accused my golden of being a bully. hes literally afraid of leaves
the vet bill was more than my rent this month lol cool cool cool
my cat judges me when i eat cereal for dinner and honestly shes right
three dogs at the park today got in a fight over a stick that wasnt even a good stick
fish dont do anything but i still talk to them every morning
hamster got into the walls again. landlord is not pleased
i told no one i have a bird watching journal with sketches. this is my confession
named my dog captain bananas when i was drunk and the microchip is permanent
its raining and my dog wants to go out. pray for me
my gf says i love the dog more than her. i said nothing and she took that as an answer
cat threw up on my laptop during a zoom call. boss saw everything
spent $600 at the vet for them to say my cat is just fat
the betta fish has more personality than most people i know tbh
my hamster runs on his wheel at 3am like hes training for something
saw a rare warbler today but cant tell anyone bc theyll think im weird
why did i name my rabbit mr. wigglebottom. im 34 years old
walked the dog in a thunderstorm bc she gave me the eyes. im a pushover
my cat sleeps on my partners side of the bed and honestly i respect her choice
someone at the dog park brings wine in a thermos. shes my hero
vet said my turtle is depressed. how do u even tell. hes a turtle
the hamster escaped during a dinner party and my guests will never return
i have binoculars for birdwatching but my neighbors think im a creep now
named my snake voldemort and the vet techs always laugh. every single time
its drizzling and my husky acts like the sky is falling. 80lb drama queen
chose adopting another cat over couples therapy. no regrets yet
my dog got kicked out of daycare for being too hyper. apple doesnt fall far
emergency vet visit at 2am bc my cat ate a rubber band. $900 rubber band
watching my fish swim in circles is more calming than any meditation app
the hamster found a way out of the cage we literally duct taped shut
went birding alone and it was the best date ive ever been on
i call my cat princess sparkle mcfluffybutt and she answers to it. thats the worst part
my dog only wants walks when its pouring rain. sunny days? nah. just rain
my bf is jealous of my parrot bc the bird gets more kisses. valid concern honestly
dog park has a whole political system now. theres factions. im not joking
vet bill for a goldfish was $200. the fish cost $0.30
my hamster learned to open the cage door. im living with a genius criminal
bought expensive binoculars for birdwatching and told everyone theyre for hiking
named my dog bark obama as a joke and now its on all his legal documents
walking 3 dogs in the rain is just a special kind of suffering
my cat and my wife have the same energy and im scared of both
the off leash dog owners at the park are forming an alliance and we must resist
spent more on my pets healthcare than my own this year. priorities
staring at the aquarium hits different at midnight. just me and the tetras
hamster went missing for 3 days. found him living behind the fridge like a king
heard a woodpecker today and almost cried. i need to get out more
my cats name is garbage and the vet always gives me a look
umbrella in one hand leash in the other coffee in my... oh wait
i talk to my dog more than my roommate and we all know whos better company
lady at the park said my dog isnt socialized enough. lady your dog bit mine
$350 blood panel for my cat to find out shes just old and grumpy. same girl same
the shrimp in my tank have more drama than reality tv
hamster squeezed through a gap i couldnt even see. im not even mad just impressed
i keep a bird life list and hide it like its contraband
named my guinea pig chonkzilla during quarantine and now its my whole personality
its barely sprinkling and my chihuahua acts like hes melting
my partner said its me or the 4th cat. anyway meet whiskers
the retriever clique at the dog park is real and they dont accept outsiders
vet said stop googling symptoms at 3am. i felt personally attacked
my betta built a bubble nest and i felt like a proud parent. its a fish
woke up to hamster sitting on my chest staring at me. cage was closed. how
saw a bald eagle on my lunch break and had to pretend i wasnt freaking out
named the kitten lord meowington the third. there was no first or second
dog insisted on the long route in a downpour. came home looking like swamp creatures
my rabbit gets more attention from my wife than i do and im not even surprised
someone brought a parrot to the dog park and chaos ensued. beautiful chaos
xray for my lizard cost more than my car payment. cool
aquarium algae bloom ruined my whole week. yes i know how that sounds
hamster literally chewed through the cage bars overnight. hes built different
joined a birdwatching group online under a fake name. living a double life
my dogs name is sir barksalot and the groomer has to call it out in the lobby
rain walks with a stubborn bulldog is just standing outside getting wet together
cat brought me a dead mouse like a gift. my partner brought me socks. cat wins
theres a group chat for our dog park and the drama is unreal
emergency vet on christmas eve bc my dog ate ornaments. festive
watching fish eat is weirdly the highlight of my mornings now
hamster escaped into the car somehow. commute was interesting
identified 47 bird species this year and told absolutely nobody until now
named my ferret stinky pete thinking it was funny. its just accurate and sad
my dog refuses to walk if theres even a puddle. princess behavior honestly
told my therapist about my fish tank and she said it was a metaphor. it isnt. i just like fish
the hamster built a nest out of my tax documents. fair enough
theres a hawk outside my office window rn and im losing my mind quietly
who let me name a puppy at 2am. sir woofs mcgee reporting for duty
every morning walk in the rain i question all my life choices
my cat hissed at my date. turns out she was right about him
the poodle owners at the park act like theyre at a country club
routine checkup for 2 cats ran me $700. routine btw. routine
my snails have names and backstories. i live alone if that wasnt obvious
hamster vanished for a week. showed up fatter. where was he eating
pretended my binoculars were for stargazing. saw a kingfisher tho so worth it
called my tortoise speedy as a joke 15 years ago. jokes on me hes still here
poured rain all week. dog still needs walks. i am a shell of a person
